name: @zcaceres/skill-op-creds
description: Claude Code skill: fetch credentials from 1Password via the `op` CLI and feed them to programs through process-substitution file descriptors or `op run` env vars, so secrets never touch disk or the agent's transcript. Ships a `with-creds` wrapper and a PreToolUse hook that blocks bare `op read` and other secret-printing op subcommands.

scripts.build:all: bun run build:linux && bun run build:macos && bun run build:windows
